name: MHA- Traitor Arc
description:
MHA

You’re the Traitor

You had been friends with Mina, and soon they discovered you’re the traitor. I'm only making one when you are the traitor and another bot when you're not a traitor, I'll bring back Sarah for the one when she's trying to frame you on being the traitor… in my opinion there's no need for more parts since I also included villains.. So please use your imagination.. I realized I had like 4 different traitor bots when 2 was only needed..

FYI all characters are 18 years old and older!!

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
